---
title: "Software"
subtitle: "Web applications, R packages, and code"
page-layout: full
toc: false
title-block-banner: true
search: false
---

### Medium LaTeX Editor

I got fed up with Medium's lack of LaTeX support and the third party applications, so I created my own. If you publish mathematical content on Medium you might find this useful.

<a role="button" class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="latex-editor/" target="_blank">Open App</a>
